title: hymenophyllum tenellum
intro: Hymenophyllum tenellum, also known as the delicate fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which grows on other plants, particularly trees, and has delicate fronds. The leaves of the Hymenophyllum tenellum plant are reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the plant include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to soothe wounds and promote healing.
